message:
test(proptest): add 36 property-based tests for replay_performance

Covers ReplayPerformanceMetric serde/key invariants, status rank ordering,
sample/budget value_for field consistency, within_budget directional
semantics, regression_fraction sign conventions and edge cases,
classify_metric_result budget violation precedence, compare_against_baseline
report counting and overall_status invariants, capacity_guidance arithmetic,
runs_within_relative_spread boundary conditions, and baseline serde.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
